memberdef.argsstring: (void *target, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint8_t alpha)
memberdef.name: GenerateRGBTestPattern

briefdescription.para: Generates a simple color ramp pattern. Alpha is set to the given value.
Generates a simple color ramp pattern. Alpha varys from 0 at the upper left to max at the lower right.
Generates 4 color ramp quadrants with alpha varying from 0 at the corners to max at the center.

memberdef.argsstring: (SDL_Surface **surface, int width, int height, uint32_t first_color, uint32_t second_color, uint32_t checker_size)
memberdef.name: GenerateCheckerboardSurface
